title: Add Conversation History
constraints: The agent must remember at least the last 5 turns of conversation
You may not use external databases or file storage
The conversation history must include both user and assistant messages
hints: Think about how to accumulate messages across multiple invocations
Most frameworks have a built-in concept of message history—check for a list or buffer you can pass between turns
Maintain a list of messages and pass it into each agent call so the model sees prior context

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.output_parsers import StrOutputParser

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# BUG: Each call is independent — the agent has no memory of prior turns
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful assistant."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm | StrOutputParser()

# Turn 1
response1 = chain.invoke({"input": "My name is Alice and I work at Acme Corp."})
print("Turn 1:", response1)

# Turn 2
response2 = chain.invoke({"input": "What company do I work at?"})
print("Turn 2:", response2)

# Turn 3
response3 = chain.invoke({"input": "What is my name?"})
print("Turn 3:", response3)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# BUG: Each run is independent — the agent has no memory of prior turns
agent = Agent(
    name="Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful assistant.",
)

# Turn 1
result1 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "My name is Alice and I work at Acme Corp.")
print("Turn 1:", result1.final_output)

# Turn 2
result2 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "What company do I work at?")
print("Turn 2:", result2.final_output)

# Turn 3
result3 = Runner.run_sync(agent, "What is my name?")
print("Turn 3:", result3.final_output)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

assistant = Agent(
    role="Assistant",
    goal="Help the user with their questions",
    backstory="You are a helpful assistant.",
    llm=llm,
)

# BUG: Each task is independent — the agent has no memory of prior turns
# Turn 1
task1 = Task(description="My name is Alice and I work at Acme Corp.", expected_output="A friendly acknowledgment", agent=assistant)
crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task1], process=Process.sequential)
result1 = crew.kickoff()
print("Turn 1:", result1)

# Turn 2
task2 = Task(description="What company do I work at?", expected_output="The company name", agent=assistant)
crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task2], process=Process.sequential)
result2 = crew.kickoff()
print("Turn 2:", result2)

# Turn 3
task3 = Task(description="What is my name?", expected_output="The user's name", agent=assistant)
crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task3], process=Process.sequential)
result3 = crew.kickoff()
print("Turn 3:", result3)

evaluationCriteria.label: Remembers user's name
evaluationCriteria.description: When asked 'What is my name?' after introduction, the agent correctly recalls the name

evaluationCriteria.label: Remembers contextual details
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent correctly recalls facts shared in earlier turns (e.g., workplace)

evaluationCriteria.label: Coherent across 5+ turns
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent maintains context through at least 5 consecutive turns without losing information
